platinum.title: The Platinum Care
platinum.description: Our highest tier service for your most precious garments. Hand-washed, steamed, and wrapped in protective tissue.

executive.title: Executive Collection
executive.description: Precision care for business attire. Perfect creases, stain removal, and fabric revitalization for your professional image.

couture.title: Couture Preservation
couture.description: Specialized care for designer pieces and delicate fabrics. Museum-quality cleaning to maintain texture and color integrity.

washSection.heading: How Would You Like it Washed?

standardWash.title: Standard Wash
standardWash.description: Our signature 48-hour service with gentle cleaning, eco-friendly detergents, and basic folding.

expressWash.title: Express Wash
expressWash.description: Need it fast? Get 24-hour turnaround, priority processing, and premium care.
